ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ad_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad campaign */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the campaign is run */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the ad campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the ad campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the ad campaign */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of advertisement */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience for the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Primary objective of the campaign */,
  "creative_assets" TEXT /* List of creative assets used in the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page that received the like */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the page */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date when the like was recorded */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to like the page */,
  "like_source" TEXT /* Source of the like */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* List of interests of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the user signed up */,
  "last_engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last engagement with the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience_demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page whose audience is being described */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the audience */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the audience */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the audience */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the audience */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the audience */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the audience */,
  "purchase_frequency" TEXT /* Purchase frequency of the audience */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page being tracked */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the page has received */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the page has received */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the page */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of the page */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of user sessions on the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad performance metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad campaign being tracked */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the ad has received */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the ad has received */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the ad */,
  "cost_per_click" REAL /* Cost per click for the ad */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the ad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic entry */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page whose audience is being described */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the audience */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the audience */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the audience */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the geographic location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the geographic location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the geographic location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page being predicted */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., Revenue, Engagement) */,
  "prediction_value" TEXT /* Value of the prediction */,
  "date_predicted" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the prediction */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken based on the prediction */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the actions taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend on the florist industry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend information */,
  "key_players" TEXT /* Key players in the market related to the trend */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Forecasted future impact of the trend */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or links to additional information about the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
